title: Polymath RFC frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a docs/rfcs/<slug>.md authored by polymath-writing:rfc. Encodes the RFC lifecycle the skill enforces (draft → proposed → accepted | withdrawn) and named authors.

owner.description: Primary author / owner. The skill insists on a named owner so the RFC has accountability.

authors.description: Optional co-authors when ownership is shared.

unresolved.description: List of unresolved questions. Empty list means none open; the skill expects this section to exist before the RFC moves to `proposed`.

adr_links.description: Paths / URLs to ADRs that flow from this RFC.
